request.integration_goal: Create a checkout session and redirect the user to Stripe Checkout.

summary: The selected docs appear sufficient for an agent to attempt a basic Checkout redirect, but the report would still warn about framework-specific setup details.

scorecard.label: Discoverability
scorecard.rationale: The quickstart page is a clear entry point for Checkout setup.

scorecard.label: Task Fit
scorecard.rationale: The selected source directly matches creating a Checkout Session and redirecting a customer.

scorecard.label: Completeness
scorecard.rationale: The flow is covered, but an agent may need extra framework-specific details to wire routes and environment variables.

scorecard.label: Copy Pasteability
scorecard.rationale: The docs provide implementation-oriented snippets, though the final app structure still depends on the user's framework.

scorecard.label: Agent Friction
scorecard.rationale: The agent likely needs to infer how to combine product, price, success, and cancel URL setup in the local app.

selected_sources.title: Stripe Checkout quickstart
selected_sources.reason_selected: Primary task page for creating and redirecting to a Checkout Session.

selected_sources.title: Stripe Checkout overview
selected_sources.reason_selected: Context page for how Checkout fits into payment flows.

extracted_facts.message: A Checkout integration needs server-side creation of a Checkout Session before redirecting the customer.
The redirect flow depends on success and cancel URLs supplied by the app.

smoke_test.message: An agent could likely create the minimal redirect flow from these pages, but may need app-specific route and environment variable conventions.
missing_facts: Exact framework route shape for the user's app
Where the app stores server-only environment variables
likely_next_steps: Create a server endpoint that creates a Checkout Session
Redirect the browser to the returned Checkout URL

warnings.message: The selected docs are product-focused; framework-specific route wiring may still require inference.

suggested_fixes.message: Add an agent-oriented checklist that names required server route, environment variable, redirect, success URL, and cancel URL steps.

metadata.notes: Illustrative contract example only; no live Firecrawl or Codex audit was run.
